This issue is archived in connection with PKD-related coverage, likely a review, obituary retrospective, or article referencing Philip K. Dick or an adaptation of his work.
page_summary:
A scanned newspaper page from the Press of Atlantic City (Atlantic City, New Jersey), dated Sunday, September 30, 2007, page 54. The clipping was sourced from Newspapers.com and downloaded on April 15, 2025. The PDF text layer contains only source metadata with no recoverable article text.

This East Coast newspaper clipping from 2007 documents the spread of Dick's cultural influence beyond California. By 2007, Richard Linklater's rotoscoped film adaptation of A Scanner Darkly (2006) had been released, and Dick's work continued to generate media coverage across the country. The specific content and its connection to Dick studies remain to be determined through examination of the scanned image.
